reviews.comment:
La parte del lavado automático va bien pero el secado y limpieza manual un desastre tanto afuera como dentro del vehículo.

(Translated by Google)
The automatic washing part works well, but the manual drying and cleaning is a disaster both outside and inside the vehicle.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSM2Zlc2t3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar estratégico para cargar combustible, muy buena atención y el YFF Full es muy bueno
El problema es lo que tardan en atender y nunca están todos los surtidores habilitados a pesar de las colas infinitas de vehículos

(Translated by Google)
It's a strategic place to refuel, the service is very good, and the YFF Full is excellent. The problem is the long wait times, and not all the pumps are ever open despite the endless lines of vehicles.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSM1pyWWl3RRAB
